images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese female model, embodying a youthful idol aesthetic with flawless skin texture and visible pores. She is lounging on a poolside sunbed, wearing a tight, form-fitting Japanese school swimsuit that accentuates her slim waist and curvy figure, the fabric sleek and textured against her skin. The background is a minimalist, high-end pool area blurred into a soft bokeh, bathed in dappled light filtering through tropical leaves, creating bright, clear patterns on her body. The scene is immersed in a dreamy pink haze, casting a romantic glow over her innocent, expressive gaze as she looks directly into the lens. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
